title: Daniel H. Pink endorses Incorruptible
summary: Bestselling author Daniel Pink calls Incorruptible the only business book he's ever read that weaves fiduciary duty and human flourishing into a single convincing argument.
blockquote: Incorruptible is the only business book I've ever read that weaves fiduciary duty and human flourishing into a single, convincing argument. Eric Ries shows why so many idealistic founders collide headfirst into a system that turns noble intentions into nasty outcomes — and then he points a way forward. By treating ownership and governance as design problems, Ries offers a bracingly practical vision of how companies can stay true and still win.
attribution_title: Author of The Power of Regret and Drive
